Package io.apicurio.datamodels.validation.rules.required

package io.apicurio.datamodels.validation.rules.required
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AaMissingAsyncApiPropertyRule
    Rule: AAD-001 Validates that AsyncAPI documents have the required 'asyncapi' property specifying the version.
    AaMissingChannelAddressRule
    Rule: CHAN-001 Validates that AsyncAPI 3.x Channel entities have the required 'address' property.
    AaMissingChannelsPropertyRule
    Rule: AAD-003 Validates that AsyncAPI 2.x documents have the required 'channels' property.
    AaMissingCorrelationIdLocationRule
     
    AaMissingMessagePayloadOrHeadersRule
    Implements the Missing Message Payload or Headers rule for AsyncAPI.
    AaMissingOperationActionRule
    Rule: AAO-001 Validates that AsyncAPI 3.x Operation has a required 'action' property.
    AaMissingOperationChannelReferenceRule
    Rule: AAO-002 Validates that AsyncAPI 3.x Operation has a required 'channel' reference.
    AaMissingParameterLocationRule
    Implements the Missing Parameter Location rule for AsyncAPI 2.x.
    AaMissingParameterSchemaRule
    Implements the Missing Parameter Schema rule for AsyncAPI 2.x.
    AaMissingSchemaDefinitionRule
    Implements the Missing Schema Definition rule for AsyncAPI 3.x MultiFormatSchema.
    AaMissingServerHostRule
    Rule: SRV-005 Validates that a Server has a 'host' property in AsyncAPI 3.x.
    AasMissingServerProtocolRule
     
    MissingApiInformationRule
    Validates that API documents have the required 'info' property.
    MissingApiKeySchemeParamLocationRule
     
    MissingApiKeySchemeParamNameRule
     
    MissingApiTitleRule
     
    MissingApiVersionRule
     
    MissingHttpSecuritySchemeTypeRule
     
    MissingLicenseNameRule

    MissingOAuthSecuritySchemeFlowsRule

    MissingSecuritySchemeTypeRule
     
    MissingServerTemplateUrlRule
     
    MissingTagNameRule

    OasMissingBodyParameterSchemaRule
     
    OasMissingDiscriminatorPropertyNameRule
     
    OasMissingExternalDocumentationUrlRule
     
    OasMissingHeaderArrayInformationRule
     
    OasMissingHeaderTypeRule
     
    OasMissingItemsArrayInformationRule
     
    OasMissingItemsTypeRule
     
    OasMissingOAuthFlowDeviceAuthUrlRule
    Validates that the Device Authorization OAuth flow has a deviceAuthorizationUrl.

    OrpcMissingContentDescriptorNameRule
    Implements the Missing Content Descriptor Name validation rule.
    OrpcMissingContentDescriptorSchemaRule
    Implements the Missing Content Descriptor Schema validation rule.
    OrpcMissingDocumentMethodsRule
    Implements the Missing Document Methods validation rule.
    OrpcMissingErrorCodeRule
    Implements the Missing Error Code validation rule.
    OrpcMissingErrorMessageRule
    Implements the Missing Error Message validation rule.
    OrpcMissingExamplePairingNameRule
    Implements the Missing Example Pairing Name validation rule.
    OrpcMissingExamplePairingParamsRule
    Implements the Missing Example Pairing Params validation rule.
    OrpcMissingLinkNameRule
    Implements the Missing Link Name validation rule.
    OrpcMissingMethodNameRule
    Implements the Missing Method Name validation rule.
    OrpcMissingMethodParamsRule
    Implements the Missing Method Params validation rule.
    OrpcMissingOpenRpcPropertyRule
    Implements the Missing OpenRPC Property validation rule.
    OrpcMissingServerVariableDefaultRule
    Implements the Missing Server Variable Default validation rule.
    RequiredPropertyValidationRule
    Base class for all Required Property rules.
